phases.requiredGate: A forward-only compatibility bridge has passed twice in staging.
phases.reason: These migrations assume the legacy text-ID foundation, while production has overlapping UUID tables.

phases.requiredGate: A current product requirement explicitly restores the legacy creator or submission surface.
phases.reason: These tables are not required by the checked-in web MVP runtime contract.

phases.requiredGate: The captured remote SQL remains equivalent to the local migration.
phases.reason: Equivalent schema changes are already recorded under different remote migration versions.

phases.requiredGate: Before/after row counts and deterministic mappings are approved in staging.
phases.reason: These migrations update, delete, or backfill data and therefore require explicit staging evidence.

phases.requiredGate: The canonical compatibility foundation exists in staging.
phases.reason: These create or expand canonical web MVP tables after overlapping legacy names are resolved.

phases.requiredGate: Schema and approved backfills pass before access-control changes are applied.
phases.reason: RLS, grants, triggers, RPCs, and public-read hardening depend on the canonical schema.

phases.requiredGate: All rows satisfy the previously added not-valid constraints.
phases.reason: Constraint validation must run last so it cannot block the compatibility backfill midway.

preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.name: rename_visitors_to_app_users
preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.reason: Preserve the current anonymous-user lineage until the identity bridge is verified.

preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.name: replace_discovery_card_limit_rules
preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.reason: Preserve the production discovery termination rules and their existing data shape.

preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.name: clarify_discovery_run_comment
preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.reason: Metadata for the preserved discovery model.

preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.name: screen_review_tables
preservedRemoteOnlyMigrations.reason: Existing review data remains available while public writes are hardened later.
